title: chamaemelum heterocarpum
intro: Chamaemelum heterocarpum, also known as chamomile, is a low-growing, daisy-like plant with white flowers and a sweet, apple-like fragrance. The medicinal properties of chamomile are attributed to its essential oils, specifically apigenin and luteolin, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of chamomile include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and calming skin irritations. Herbal preparations of chamomile include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.
